name: PM-KISAN
description: Provides ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 each, directly into their bank accounts.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land (subject to exclusion criteria for higher income groups)

name: PMFBY (Crop Insurance)
description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana provides comprehensive insurance coverage against crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops
benefits: Crop loss protection from natural calamities
Low premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi
Full sum insured with no cap on subsidy

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Provides short-term credit to farmers for cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and allied activities at subsidized interest rates.
eligibility: Farmers, fishermen, and animal husbandry farmers with land or lease documents

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
description: ₹1 lakh crore financing facility for investment in post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, PACS, agri-entrepreneurs, startups, and state agencies
benefits: 3% interest subvention for up to 7 years
Credit guarantee coverage up to ₹2 crore
Loans for cold storage, warehouses, processing units

name: PM-KUSUM
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthan Mahabhiyan — subsidy for installing solar pumps and solar power plants on agricultural land.
eligibility: Individual farmers, farmer groups, cooperatives with land access
benefits: Up to 60% subsidy on solar pumps
Extra income from selling surplus power

name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Online trading platform connecting APMC mandis across India for transparent price discovery and better returns for farmers.
eligibility: Farmers registered with any APMC mandi in e-NAM network

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and health card for every farmer, providing crop-wise nutrient recommendations to improve productivity.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster-based approach with financial assistance for inputs, certification, and marketing.
eligibility: Groups of 50+ farmers forming a cluster of 20 hectares

name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization
description: Provides subsidies on purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment, and supports Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs).
eligibility: Individual farmers, farmer groups, FPOs, and entrepreneurs

name: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture
description: Promotes sustainable agriculture through water use efficiency, soil health management, and climate change adaptation strategies.
eligibility: All farmers, with priority for rainfed and vulnerable areas
